content: AI usage is billed from your prepaid balance. If the balance is too low, AI requests will not be processed.

comment.text: This text explains how AI usage is billed and what happens if the user's prepaid balance is insufficient. It appears as a descriptive text accompanying a toggle switch to enable or disable AI tools within the Portal Settings. Translators should ensure the explanation of billing and balance considerations remains clear.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.toggleSection}>
 <ServiceToggleSection
 isEnabled={isAiToolsServiceOn}
 onToggle={onToggleChange}
 title={t("EnableOrganizationAI", { organizationName: logoText })}
 description={t("EnableAIDescription")}
 testId="service-ai-toggle-button"
 isDisabled={isDisabled}
 />
 
 <WalletInfo shortView withoutBackground balance={balance} />
